title: Prologis Acquires 15-Property Industrial Portfolio in Chicago Metro for 420M
summary: Prologis announced the acquisition of a 15-property industrial portfolio in the Chicago metropolitan area for approximately 420 million dollars. The portfolio comprises 3.1 million square feet of Class A warehouse and distribution space.

title: Prologis Reports Record Q4 2024 Revenue of 2.647B
summary: Prologis reported record fourth quarter revenue of 2.647 billion dollars representing a 12 percent year over year increase. Net income for the quarter reached 1.123 billion dollars driven by strong occupancy rates across all markets.

title: Prologis Expands into Dallas-Fort Worth with 250M Logistics Development
summary: Prologis announced plans to develop a 250 million dollar logistics facility in the Dallas-Fort Worth corridor. The development will include 850000 sq ft of modern distribution space expected to complete by Q2 2026.

title: Prologis Completes 1B Green Bond Offering for Sustainability Initiatives
summary: Prologis successfully completed a 1 billion dollar green bond offering to fund sustainability initiatives. Proceeds will finance solar installations and LEED certification upgrades across 50 properties.

title: Prologis Signs Long-Term Lease with Amazon for 12 Logistics Properties
summary: Prologis entered a long term lease agreement with Amazon for 12 logistics properties totaling 5.2 million square feet. The 15 year agreement valued at approximately 1.1 billion dollars strengthens Prologis industrial segment.
